final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero banner, summer fashion
Primary request: white summer dress flowing gently in sea breeze on beach
Scene/backdrop: tropical beach with clear blue sky and turquoise ocean, soft sand, distant horizon
Subject: elegant white sleeveless summer dress with lightweight fabric, natural flowing movement, no model visible or mannequin-style presentation
Style/medium: Japanese film photography aesthetic, editorial fashion photography
Composition/framing: medium shot with dress as central focus, negative space for text overlay, 3:2 landscape orientation
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight, soft diffused sunlight, fresh and airy vacation mood
Color palette: crisp white dress + azure blue sky + turquoise sea + warm beige sand, clean pastel tones
Materials/textures: airy chiffon or cotton fabric with visible texture, soft fabric folds, subtle grain from film emulation
Constraints: dress must appear to be floating/moving in wind, background must show both sky and sea
Avoid: harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, visible mannequin parts, plastic-looking fabric
